cross_scene_arcs.title: Command Post and Communication Tactics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Moretti establishes a barbershop command post, gains intelligence by pressuring Leon, and adapts communication to a bullhorn when phones fail.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Setting up tactical control with direct phone line to bank
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Using bullhorn for public appeal after phone disruption
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Effectiveness of bullhorn communication and Leon's cooperation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Building and Testing Rapport with Sonny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Moretti initiates phone dialogue, proposes unarmed visits to build trust, negotiates formal demands amid distrust, and assures Sonny with promises to maintain cooperation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: First contact with Sonny via phone
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Sonny accepts assurances about transport and his wife
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether promises will be kept and Sonny's next actions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Navigating Orders and Personal Anxiety
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Moretti orders police to lower weapons, receives high-stakes orders from the Commissioner, and faces federal jurisdiction proposals while admitting fear of making mistakes.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Confronting potential loss of control and personal vulnerability
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Resolution of authority conflict and Moretti's confidence

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sal's Escalation as Armed Robber
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sal progresses from walking toward the bank to actively threatening bank personnel with a machine pistol, acting as an armed lookout, showing eagerness for violence, and being established as 'the killer' to authorities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Identified as 'the killer' and Vietnam veteran by Sonny to negotiators.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sal and Sonny's Deteriorating Partnership
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The bond between Sal and Sonny evolves from Sonny trusting Sal for armed cover and reaffirming a suicide pact to increased trust when Sal receives the rifle, but later tensions arise over loyalty and Sonny dismisses Sal's concerns about media portrayal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Sonny explicitly trusts Sal to provide armed cover.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tension and distrust, with Sal doubting Sonny's loyalty and Sonny dismissing Sal's issues.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Sal's doubt about Sonny's loyalty and the escape plan, and whether Sonny confirms the suicide pact.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sal's Personal Struggles and Exposure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sal's personal concerns about health and sexuality are highlighted when he argues against smoking and protests media portrayal as homosexual, culminating in the exposure of his traumatic prison gang-rape to hostages.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Argues against Sylvia smoking for health reasons.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Past trauma revealed to hostages, with media portrayal persisting.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The media continues to portray Sal as homosexual, and his trauma is exposed without resolution.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Sal's Fatal Escape Attempt
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sal briefly smiles believing escape is possible during the limo ride to the airport, but reacts too slowly to the driver's gun and is shot dead, with his body carried away and personal secrets revealed posthumously.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Smiles believing escape is within grasp.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deceased, body removed from the scene.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Managing the Robbery's Early Challenges
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sonny deals with team desertion and discovers the heist yields minimal cash, forcing him to adapt his approach.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Robbery in progress with multiple team members.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reduced to two robbers with low funds and bank secured.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to proceed with limited resources and manpower.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Standoff and Media Leverage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sonny establishes police contact, uses public and media attention to pressure authorities, gives a live interview to justify actions, and asserts control over FBI in selecting a driver.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Public platform gained and FBI compliance secured.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether media attention will lead to a successful escape or resolution.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Motives and Family Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sonny's robbery motive is revealed as funding Leon's sex change; he confronts family issues, learns of father's disownment, and dictates a will providing for loved ones and seeking forgiveness.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Affairs settled with bequests and emotional acknowledgments.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The fulfillment of his wishes after imprisonment.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Arrest and Imprisonment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Sonny is disarmed and arrested by FBI, emotionally breaks down, and is sentenced to 25 years in prison, with hostages moving on and forgetting him.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His future in prison and the impact on his relationships.
